examples: We rented our apartment to friends while we were abroad

meanings.definition: hold under a lease or rental agreement; of goods and services
grant use or occupation of under a term of contract
examples: I am leasing my country estate to some foreigners

meanings.definition: engage for service under a term of contract
examples: We took an apartment on a quiet street
Shall we take a guide in Rome?

meanings.definition: hired for the exclusive temporary use of a group of travelers
examples: the chartered buses arrived on time
